postReview.title: Turkiye 0-3 Portugal: Ronaldo breaks assist record as Selecao top Group F
postReview.description: Cristiano Ronaldo took his assist tally at the Euros to seven as Portugal confirmed their place in the last 16 with a win over Turkiye.
